summary: Iteration 5 frontend-only retest of the 2 bugs found in iteration 4. BOTH FIXES VERIFIED PASS. FIX A (global search ↔ Products page integration): /products?q=hoodie now returns exactly 2 hoodie cards (Zip-Up Hoodie + Pullover Hoodie) instead of all 15. The local product-search input is correctly pre-filled with 'hoodie' from the URL. Bonus: typing in the local search debounces and writes back to the URL (?q=tee appeared after ~600ms), and clearing the input drops the q param entirely. Global header search → Enter also lands on /products?q=hoodie with 2 filtered cards. FIX B (super-admin Crown testid): data-testid='admin-crown-icon' is now present in the Admin header when logged in as superadmin@merchcraft.in, and is correctly ABSENT for the regular admin (admin@merchcraft.in). Regression spot-checks all green: admins tab visible only for superadmin, customers tab visible for regular admin, home page renders trending-section + 7 bestseller cards, free-shipping flash banner text visible at top of every page.

issues: React warning still present: 'An empty string ("") was passed to the src attribute' on product/category images with empty image fields. Not blocking but recommend guarding .

action_items: (Optional carry-over) Guard tags against empty-string src to clear the React console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Products.jsx now seeds q from useSearchParams and writes back via setSearchParams within a debounced effect — clean, idiomatic, and matches the iteration-4 RCA fix recommendation exactly.
Admin.jsx Crown icon has data-testid='admin-crown-icon' gated by isSuperAdmin — testable and role-correct.
No new code-quality issues introduced; both fixes are minimal and surgical.
seed_data_creation: none — no test data created in this iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 bugs are fully resolved. Backend was already 100% green (per iter 4). The only outstanding non-blocking item is the empty-string-src React warning on some images. Both auth flows (superadmin and admin) and the global → local search integration are fully verified.

rca_of_the_issue.global_search_fix_verification: Products.jsx now: (1) reads urlQ via searchParams.get('q'), (2) initializes useState(urlQ) so deep-links pre-fill, (3) has a debounced effect that updates the URL via setSearchParams on q changes. Verified by direct URL nav, header global-search Enter, and clearing input.
rca_of_the_issue.crown_testid_fix_verification: data-testid='admin-crown-icon' was added on the Crown element at Admin.jsx:166 and rendered conditionally on isSuperAdmin. Verified present for superadmin and absent for regular admin.
